title: Additional files for manuscript titled 'The double round-robin population unravels the genetic architecture of grain size in barley'
author: Shrestha, Asis
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Additional file 1: Parental allele for barley orthologs of genes controlling grain size in rice 

 Additional file 2: Cross-validation of quantitative trait loci (QTLs) detected for grain size characters in rice 

 Additional file 3: Adjusted entry means of recombinant inbred lines of 45 HvDRR sub-populations
steps_raw:

 Additional file 2: Cross-validation of quantitative trait loci (QTLs) detected for grain size characters in rice 

 Additional file 3: Adjusted entry means of recombinant inbred lines of 45 HvDRR sub-populations
keywords: grain size, grain weight, barley, quantitative trait locus, multi-parent
